originContent: # Hornet Nest Alarm Panel for ESPHome
translatedContent: # Hornet Nest 报警面板 ESPHome 固件

originContent: This repository houses the officially supported **ESPHome** firmware configuration files for the **Hornet Nest Alarm Panel**, developed by **Technology Automation Consulting LLC**. The Hornet Nest Alarm Panel is a scalable and customizable IoT solution designed to integrate traditional wired alarm systems into your smart home using **Home Assistant**. With 42 optoisolated zones, 3 relay outputs, and flexible PoE or 12V power options, it’s built for flexibility and reliability.
translatedContent: 本仓库包含由 **Technology Automation Consulting LLC** 开发的官方支持的 **ESPHome** 固件配置文件，适用于 **Hornet Nest 报警面板**。Hornet Nest 报警面板是一款可扩展且可定制的物联网解决方案，旨在通过 **Home Assistant** 将传统有线报警系统集成到智能家居中。它配备 42 个光耦隔离区域，3 个继电器输出，并支持灵活的 PoE 或 12V 电源选项，兼具灵活性和可靠性。

originContent: <div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between;">
translatedContent: <div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between;">

originContent: ## Quick Start
translatedContent: ## 快速开始

originContent: Get started quickly by adopting and flashing your Hornet Nest Alarm Panel with the latest ESPHome firmware:
translatedContent: 通过以下步骤快速开始，使用最新的 ESPHome 固件采用并刷写您的 Hornet Nest 报警面板：

originContent: 1. Plug a PoE powered ethernet cable into the Hornet Nest Alarm Panel.
translatedContent: 1. 将支持 PoE 的以太网线插入 Hornet Nest 报警面板。

originContent: 2. Open the **ESPHome Dashboard** and locate the device "hornet-nest-XXXXXX" (where XXXXXX is a unique hexadecimal identifier).
translatedContent: 2. 打开 **ESPHome 控制面板**，找到设备 "hornet-nest-XXXXXX"（其中 XXXXXX 是唯一的十六进制标识符）。

originContent: 3. Click on the **Adopt** option on the device.
translatedContent: 3. 点击设备上的 **Adopt（采用）** 选项。

originContent: 4. The **Adopt Device** dialog will open.  You can rename your device if desired and then click the **Adopt** option again.
translatedContent: 4. 将打开 **Adopt Device（采用设备）** 对话框。您可以根据需要重命名设备，然后再次点击 **Adopt**。

originContent: 5. The **Configuration Created** dialog will open and indicate that a new configuration needs to be installed on the device, click the **Install** button.
translatedContent: 5. 将打开 **Configuration Created（配置已创建）** 对话框，提示需要在设备上安装新配置，点击 **Install（安装）** 按钮。

originContent: 6. ESPHome will begin to compile the new firmware. When the line **"INFO Sucessfully uploaded program."** is diplayed, click **STOP** to close the window.
translatedContent: 6. ESPHome 将开始编译新固件。当显示 **"INFO Successfully uploaded program."** 行时，点击 **STOP** 关闭窗口。

originContent: 4. Discover the Hornet Nest Alarm Panel in **Home Assistant** > **Settings** > **Devices & Services**.
translatedContent: 4. 在 **Home Assistant** > **设置** > **设备与服务** 中发现 Hornet Nest 报警面板。

originContent: 5. Click **Configure** on the new device to add it into Home Assistant.
translatedContent: 5. 点击新设备上的 **配置**，将其添加到 Home Assistant 中。

originContent: ## Changes and Release Notes
translatedContent: ## 变更与发行说明

originContent: See **Releases** for release notes and downloadable pre-built firmware images.
translatedContent: 请参阅 **Releases（发行版）** 获取发行说明和可下载的预构建固件镜像。

originContent: ## Made for ESPHome
translatedContent: ## 为 ESPHome 设计

originContent: The **Hornet Nest Alarm Panel** uses the **wESP32 PoE** microcontroller and is fully compatible with **ESPHome** firmware. It is an open-source product, designed for easy user customization, making it ideal for Home Assistant users who need a scalable and flexible alarm solution. The included **ESPHome YAML configuration files** are fully documented, allowing advanced users to easily customize, build, and update their device with a few simple modifications.
translatedContent: **Hornet Nest 报警面板** 使用 **wESP32 PoE** 微控制器，完全兼容 **ESPHome** 固件。它是一款开源产品，设计易于用户定制，非常适合需要可扩展和灵活报警解决方案的 Home Assistant 用户。所附的 **ESPHome YAML 配置文件** 具有完整文档，允许高级用户通过简单修改轻松定制、构建和更新设备。

originContent: ## Works with Home Assistant
translatedContent: ## 兼容 Home Assistant

originContent: These **ESPHome** firmware configurations allow for a simple, plug-and-play setup within **Home Assistant**. The integration is local, fast, and fully customizable, giving users complete control over their home security system.
translatedContent: 这些 **ESPHome** 固件配置可实现与 **Home Assistant** 的简单即插即用设置。集成本地化、快速且完全可定制，赋予用户对家庭安全系统的完全控制权。

originContent: ## In This Repository
translatedContent: ## 仓库内容

originContent: This repository contains **complete firmware configuration YAML templates** for the **Hornet Nest Alarm Panel** at the top level. These templates are ready to be imported using **ESPHome Dashboard**, where they can be customized and deployed.
translatedContent: 本仓库顶层包含 **Hornet Nest 报警面板** 的完整固件配置 YAML 模板。这些模板可通过 **ESPHome 控制面板** 导入，支持定制和部署。

originContent: ## User Manual
translatedContent: ## 用户手册
有关详细说明，请参阅官方用户手册[这里。](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/taconsultingllc/hornet-nest-alarm-panel/main/hnap-user-manual.pdf)

originContent: For detailed instructions, please refer to the official user manual [here.](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/taconsultingllc/hornet-nest-alarm-panel/main/hnap-user-manual.pdf)
